name: iter-openai-bridge
description: Vercel serverless API bridge that classifies Romanian user requests into categories using OpenAI. For use with Wix.

scripts.build: echo "No build step required for serverless API"
scripts.test:projects-intent: node --test tests/projects-intent-analysis.test.mjs tests/projects-icon-assignment.test.mjs tests/projects-safety.test.mjs tests/projects-brain.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-service.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-actions.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-sessions.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-adaptive.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-execution-definition.test.mjs tests/projects-brain-catalog-parity.test.mjs
